case_title: CATHY RILEY VS. ALISTCOVERAGE.COM et al

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JPT JEAN MILEFF FILED BY RILEY, CATHY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2011 BY JPT JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-26-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WARREN, BILL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-09-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT W4
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY RILEY, CATHY AS TO DEFENDANT ALISTCOVERAGE.COM WARREN, BILL W4 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF RILEY, CATHY AS TO DEFENDANT W4
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 11/04/11 TO ALISTCOVERAGE.COM, "NO LONGER AT THIS ADDRESS".
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-26-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ALISTCOVERAGE.COM
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. DEFENDANTS NOT PRESENT. JPT JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED. (506). PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RILEY, CATHY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALISTCOVERAGE.COM WARREN, BILL $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,155.00, DEFENDANT W4 DISMISSED W/PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 11/04/11 TO BILL WARREN, "NO LONGER AT THIS ADDRESS".
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
